utility_evaluation.REASONING: There are 5 items in the required format: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, total_budget. All 5 appear in the final coverage plan. Now check if each is fully specified with all required details (including costs). 1) health_coverage: Includes physical and mental health insurance with costs (€100 and €65, total €165) and brief benefits; fully specified. 2) property_coverage: Home/contents insurance with cost (€60/month) and brief coverage details; fully specified. 3) travel_coverage: Travel insurance with costs (€115/month plus €80 add-on, total €195) and coverage limits for emergency medical and evacuation; fully specified. 4) additional_services: Contains enhancement services with costs (Adventure Travel Add-on €80/month) and description; fully specified. 5) total_budget: Provides complete monthly and annual cost breakdown and per-category breakdown; fully specified.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final coverage plan includes four specific items: LifeFirst Standard for Physical Health, LifeFirst Standard for Mental Health, LifeFirst Standard Coverage for property, PrimeTravel Premium Plan for travel, and Adventure Travel Coverage Add-on. I matched each to the corresponding entries in the ground-truth ratings: primary_health_coverage.physical_health.LifeFirst Standard Plan (rating 9), primary_health_coverage.mental_health.LifeFirst Standard Plan (rating 9), property_protection.home_content.LifeFirst Standard Coverage (rating 9), mobility_coverage.travel_insurance.PrimeTravel Premium Plan (rating 6), and travel_enhancement_services.Adventure Travel Coverage (rating 10). The Adventure Travel Coverage appears both within travel_coverage and additional_services, but it is a single item with one rating.
